title: K8s CrashLoopBackOff & OOMKilled Detector
description:
Each line of input is `pod_name status restart_count`. Find all pods with status `CrashLoopBackOff` or `OOMKilled`.

Return them as `pod_name status restart_count` per line, sorted by restart_count descending.

Return empty string if none found.
constraints: Only include CrashLoopBackOff or OOMKilled pods

examples.input:
web-7d9f8b Running 2
api-5c8d4f CrashLoopBackOff 47
db-6e7f9g OOMKilled 12
worker-abc Running 0
examples.explanation: Two unhealthy pods, sorted by restart count descending

test_cases.input:
web-7d9f8b Running 2
api-5c8d4f CrashLoopBackOff 47
db-6e7f9g OOMKilled 12
worker-abc Running 0

alpha CrashLoopBackOff 5
beta OOMKilled 20
gamma CrashLoopBackOff 20
delta Running 0
test_cases.expected_output:
beta OOMKilled 20
gamma CrashLoopBackOff 20
alpha CrashLoopBackOff 5
